title: 信息日报 2026-06-14

headline.title: 美国政府指令暂停外国用户访问Fable 5和Mythos 5 AI模型
headline.summary: 美国以出口管制为由，要求暂停所有外国国民（包括Anthropic外籍员工）对Fable 5和Mythos 5模型的访问权限。此举引发对AI模型全球分发和国家安全平衡的激烈讨论。
headline.title_en: US Government Directive Suspends Foreign Access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5 AI Models
headline.summary_en: The US government, citing export control and national security, orders suspension of access to Anthropic's Fable 5 and Mythos 5 models for any foreign national, including foreign employees of Anthropic. The move ignites debate on global AI distribution and security.
headline.original_title: Statement on the US government directive to suspend access to Fable 5 and Mythos 5
headline.reason: 该事件集地缘政治与前沿AI技术于一身，政策影响深远，且被多家媒体转载，是当日最具新闻价值的头条。
headline.reason_en: This event combines geopolitics and frontier AI technology, with far-reaching policy implications, widely cited by multiple outlets, making it the most newsworthy lead of the day.
